PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALPHONSE, VITALEME PIERRE, YLERIL LOUIS, JUSTIN SAINT ALPHONSE, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIZZELL, NATALIA MIZZELL, CHRISTOPHER $16,283.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,283.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: JUDGMENT FOR PLTFS AS FOLLOWS: V. ALPHONSE: $2500 P.D. + $3785 P.I; Y. PIERRE: $3895 P.I.; S. ALPHONSE: $3159 P.I; J. STLOUIS: $2944 P.I. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS
